$schema_note: Canonical pointer to where the build is. Re-derive context from this + blackboard files; do not scroll chat history.

project.tagline: Orchestrate swarms of CLI coding agents in parallel across isolated git worktrees.

phase_status.1_brand_design: done (v0.2.0; CI run 27520745796; Critic 5/5 PASS; screenshots evidence/phase-1)
phase_status.2_host_engine: done (v0.3.0; CI run 27536255083 GREEN 3 OSes; Critic review-3 PASS; P01/P02/P03/P04/P07/P10/P11 proven incl Windows; no quarantines)

stack_decision.db: PGlite (embedded Postgres, WASM) via Drizzle ORM; real Postgres optional
stack_decision.sync: self-hosted WebSocket + PGlite-backed append-only event log + resume tokens
stack_decision.pty: @homebridge/node-pty-prebuilt-multiarch (ConPTY on Windows; prebuilds win/mac/linux incl Node24 ABI, no compiler) — VALIDATED ADR-0007a; PTY layer/host engine runs under NODE not Bun (Bun tears down ConPTY net.Socket on Windows); tree-kill verified killing process trees
stack_decision.mobile: PWA-first (service worker, Web Push/VAPID); Capacitor optional/deferred

next_actions: Phase 3 (Desktop Client, Electron): apps/desktop Electron shell + React renderer on @swarm/ui + host tRPC/sync client (endpoint+bearer token from ~/.grove/host/manifest.json); feature UI = terminal (xterm.js: tabs, split right/down, clear, find, preset slots Ctrl+1-9, prev/next tab) [P05], diff viewer + inline editor [P06], workspace nav/create/quick-create/open-project + open-in-external [P08/P09], customizable keyboard shortcuts + settings surface [P09]; wire to the REAL host engine; Playwright e2e of the renderer; Critic gate incl §6.3 anti-slop design bar + desktop & phone screenshots -> v0.4.0

[Phase 6 / launch sign-off] produce the §6.2/§6.4 reports the final Critic flagged as missing: performance report + recorded speed budgets (terminal-stream latency, interaction latency, cold start) and a license-audit report under evidence/ (non-blocking for v0.3.0; required before v1.0.0)

[harness retro follow-up] route the CI-gate lessons (turbo-cache false-green -> --force; GH-windows ConPTY discipline -> direct PTY spawn+onExit / process.execPath / child_process for batch / worker process.exit / bounded fs.rm; fresh independent Critics catch fakes) into recursive-harness artifacts via /harness-pr
critic_followups_for_phase2: [DONE wave-1] @swarm/api completed to all 13 routers of architecture §3.1; SwarmConfig now Command[] arrays + per-OS shells + per-field overlay (9 tests)
